_publications._publicationTitle: Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.

_contextSnippet: Nf2 inactivation results in increased NPC growth (1.8-fold increase in neurosphere diameter...3.6-fold increase in cell number at day 8...1.7-fold increase in clonogenic expansion
resourceName: Nf2-deficient spinal cord neural progenitor cells
details: Showed 1.8-fold increase in neurosphere diameter, 3.6-fold increase in cell number, 1.7-fold increase in clonogenic expansion, and altered differentiation patterns
